channel.title: Visit Bradford Yorkshire Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events from Visit Bradford.

item.title: Address
item.description: Bolling Hall Museum is marking 110 years with new photo displays from the 1870s–1880s and its 1912–1915 restoration, plus objects linked to its past, including a sword, a book from the garderobe and the 1915 opening key.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: BD: Walls is an ambitious exhibition with a difference: the gallery is Bradford District itself.
item.location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: New works on walls across Bradford District, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: See the Tower of Now, Saad Qureshi’s 15-metre sculpture at Hall Ings, Bradford, celebrating the city’s diversity and cultural heritage.
item.location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.ify:location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: bradford.markets@bradford.gov.uk
item.location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.ify:location: 16 - 24 Darley Street Kitchen, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3HH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Step into the imaginative world of Jim Moir, the celebrated British artist, AKA Vic Reeves at Cartwright Hall, Bradford.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, artworks by twelve South Asian artists highlight shared environmental, social and historical realities.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition pairs contemporary artist film from the Art Jameel collection with a complementary display of Islamic calligraphy from Bradford District Museums & Galleries.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Several of the largest paintings in Bradford’s collection are brought together in The Big Picture at Cartwright Hall, a display spanning more than two centuries of art.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Cartwright Hall Art Gallery presents a selection of works from Bradford District Museums & Galleries’ Pre‑Raphaelite collection.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Following its success in 2025, Extraordinary Portraits with Bill Bailey returns to The Loading Bay in Bradford. All six original artworks from the hit BBC One series will be on display at this free exhibition.
item.location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.ify:location: Loading Bay, 1 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Bradford Industrial Museum, Made by Many Hands highlights local craft traditions inspired by the Heritage Crafts list and is accompanied by workshops and events across the site.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: At Cartwright Hall, this exhibition revisits the 1904 Great Exhibition by centring the Somali Village and its colonial context.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrating 70 years of Eurovision at the National Science and Media Museum. Go behind the sequins of the world’s largest live music event and discover how the magic really happens.
item.location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Free monthly stay‑and‑play sessions for children aged 0–5 and their parents/carers, inspired by 50 Things to Do Before You’re Five.
item.location: Across Bradford Museums, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Across Bradford Museums, Bradford, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: A new exhibition at the Bradford Police Museum
item.location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.ify:location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Unleash your inner pop star over the summer holidays with creative activities for all ages at the National Science and Media Museum.
item.location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: National Science and Media Museum, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: This summer, The Broadway is bringing all the excitement of the fairground indoors with six weeks of FREE family fun!
item.location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.ify:location: Broadway Bradford, Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: The boys are coming back to the Alhambra Theatre.
item.location: Alhambra Theatre, Morley Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD7 1AJ
item.ify:location: Alhambra Theatre, Morley Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD7 1AJ
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Baildon Farmers Market is a monthly food market that’s rated one of the finest in the UK, and the best in Yorkshire!
item.location: Lower Ian Clough Car Park, Browgate, Baildon, West Yorkshire, BD17 5LA
item.ify:location: Lower Ian Clough Car Park, Browgate, Baildon, West Yorkshire, BD17 5LA

item.title: Address
item.description: Catch the all‑new Be Like Blippi Tour live at Bradford Live, bringing Blippi and Meekah to the stage for an interactive family adventure.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: With clues, pirate songs and plenty of swashbuckling adventure, Fireman Sam's new live show at St. George's Hall is perfect for all budding pirates!
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Enjoy 2 shows in one with Lighthouse Studios Academy at Bradford Playhouse in their Double-Bill production of Annie Jr and Legally Blonde Jr.
item.location: Bradford Playhouse, 4 -12 Chapel Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5DL
item.ify:location: Bradford Playhouse, 4 -12 Chapel Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5DL
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Become a little archaeologist as you dig to uncover Roman or Viking clues — a fun, educational family activity at Bolling Hall Museum.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Topic Folk Club welcomes a pair of brilliant musicians
item.location: Wallers Bar, Millergate, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1SX
item.ify:location: Wallers Bar, Millergate, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1SX
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Visit Cartwright Hall Art Gallery to make a friendship bracelet to take home, contribute to a giant Tree of Life artwork, and add your own wish to the growing display.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: The Bradford Culture Company brings the Beacon to Wibsey Park this August for a month of family‑friendly comedy, music, performance and play.
item.location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.ify:location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD

item.title: Address
item.description: A fantastic night of music and song to celebrate Yorkshire Day in proper Yorkshire style at St. George's Hall.
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Yorkshire Day at Bradford Industrial Museum brings live music, Morris dancing, family activities, a visiting horse, and the vibrant Made By Many Hands Makers Market together for a lively summer celebration.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Bradford City Mela returns with music, dance, food and culture across City Park, plus a community stage at Darley Street Market celebrating local talent and creativity.
item.location: City Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.ify:location: City Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Experience the rich colours of classic Technicolor cinema on the big screen at Pictureville, with a season of Hollywood favourites spanning adventure, romance, musicals and psychological drama.
item.location: Pictureville and Cubby Broccoli Cinemas, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ
item.ify:location: Pictureville and Cubby Broccoli Cinemas, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1NQ

item.title: Address
item.description: Discover fascinating facts about the inspiring Brontë sisters at Bolling Hall Museum, learn storytelling techniques, and create your own miniature book to fill with stories—just as the Brontës did when they were children.
item.location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.ify:location: Bolling Hall, Bowling Hall Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD4 7LP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Explore geometric patterns inspired by art and design, then create and decorate your own colourful coaster to take home as a special keepsake at Cartwright Hall Art Gallery.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Fans can expect a powerful sweep of classic and cosmic Hawkwind music at Bradford Live.
item.location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.ify:location: Bradford Live, 1 Thornton Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 2EP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: The Total Stone Roses bring the sound and spirit of Manchester’s iconic band to Underground Bradford.
item.location: The Underground, 9 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.ify:location: The Underground, 9 Duke Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 3QR
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Visit the Bradford Industrial Museum for a hands‑on wet‑felting craft session the whole family can enjoy.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP

item.title: Address
item.description: Back by popular demand for 2026, Audacious presents a new British South Asian family pantomime! Get ready for an evening of laughter, romance, and larger-than-life entertainment at St. George's Hall.
item.location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.ify:location: St Georges Hall, Bridge Street, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1JT
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Join Samantha Yates, stained glass artist and conservator, for an exclusive full day workshop creating your own bespoke leaded glass panel in the Heritage Craft Room at Bradford Industrial Museum.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Heritage Craft Room, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: If you’re into vintage cars, come and see amazing old‑timer models, try car‑making with recycled materials, and have a go at the Jowett board game at Bradford Industrial Museum.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Bring an old T-shirt to Bradford Industrial Museum and transform it into a unique fashion statement in this fun family upcycling workshop inspired by the exhibition Made by Many Hands.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Take part in the Moorside Mill Mystery at Bradford Industrial Museum, exploring historic mill buildings, meeting live suspects and uncovering clues as you work to crack the case.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.description: Come to discover medications of the past at Bolling Hall Museum.

item.title: Address
item.description: Celebrate summer at Cartwright Hall Art Gallery with an afternoon/evening of nature-inspired activities, creative workshops and family-friendly fun, all set within the beautiful surroundings of Lister Park and Cartwright Hall.
item.location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.ify:location: Cartwright Hall, Lister Park, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD9 4NS
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Join The Bradford Police Museum for a unique Trial by Jury!
item.location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.ify:location: Bradford Police Museum, City Hall, Centenary Square, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 1HY
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: A thrilling orchestral tribute to the iconic music of James Bond, performed by world‑class musicians and vocalists at Bradford Cathedral.
item.location: Bradford Cathedral, 1 Stott Hill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4EH
item.ify:location: Bradford Cathedral, 1 Stott Hill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 4EH
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Address
item.description: Build, climb and explore at MORPHOSIS in Wibsey Park, then discover more Nature Season adventures with Explore West Yorkshire.
item.location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
item.ify:location: Wibsey Park, Wibsey Park Avenue, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD6 3QD
